title: Import, copy & paste automation between boards and templates

posts.author: david.lowe (David Lowe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hello Team, I would like to make a feature request to be able to import/copy&paste complete automations from other boards or pull from a template in the Template Centre. I my mind it would work like this,

  1. from the Automations screen select the import icon,
  2. navigate to the board or a template within the Template Centre,
  3. select (radio button or checkbox) one or many automations that you want to copy,
  4. select a button to import to finish the operation.

What are you trying to achieve

To create efficiencies, consistency across similar board structures and time saving when creating and copying boards. It would also solve the issue that when an instance of a Managed Template has not copied a complete of automation, the instance could be updated easily from the template.
